justifications.clarity: Definitions are consistently stated before use (PRA loop defined in Section 1 before ReAct in Section 2); transitions are logical and each paragraph's opening sentence states its main point.
justifications.rigor: Mathematical formulations provided for PRA loop, ReAct trajectory, cosine retrieval, BM25, hybrid score, and RAG marginal; a few empirical claims (e.g., metadata filtering reduces irrelevant retrievals by ~60%) lack an explicit citation.
justifications.completeness: All eight learning objectives are addressed with dedicated sections, worked examples (Apple 10-K chunking, earnings call pipeline), and BOOK-ONLY tags appropriately deferring deep content.
justifications.pedagogy: The 'Why Passivity is a Limitation' section motivates the formal PRA loop before defining it; difficulty progresses from single-step inference to multi-agent governance; every major concept includes a worked finance example.
justifications.style: Notation is consistent across sections (cosine similarity convention using bold vectors throughout Sections 3 and 6); prose flows without AI filler phrases; markdown and LaTeX math fences are correctly formatted.
